dropped.name: GPT-4 Turbo v2
dropped.drop_reason: Score 2 falls below model main threshold (≥7) and brief threshold (5-6); incremental function-calling improvement lacks independent verification and ecosystem echo; no community testing yet; rollout too early to assess impact

summary.editorial_notes: Strong week for creative workflows. Midjourney's web-first shift and Claude's extended context both directly address design/synthesis pain points. Llama open-weight release shows strong ecosystem adoption. Startup inclusion satisfied with Cursor Pro (main) and PixelGenius (brief). GPT-4 Turbo v2 dropped due to lack of verification and ecosystem signals; revisit if community testing emerges.
